title: Portfolio Website
description: My personal portfolio featuring a sleek UI and an integrated AI assistant that can answer questions about my skills, projects, and experience.

title: Inventory Management System

title: Contest Hub
description: A modern, real-time dashboard that aggregates competitive programming contests from Codeforces, LeetCode, and CodeChef with live countdowns and smart filtering.
